content.json:
# 🔄 Lateral Movement & Internal Reconnaissance
---
Detects internal movement by correlating Windows logon events with Syslog Unix auth activity and firewall internal traffic. Identifies accounts moving between systems, segmentation violations, and reconnaissance patterns.

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4624
| where LogonType in (3, 10)
| where isnotempty(TargetUserName) and TargetUserName !has '$'
| summarize
    SystemCount = dcount(Computer),
    Systems = make_set(Computer, 10),
    LogonCount = count(),
    LastLogon = max(TimeGenerated)
    by TargetUserName
| where SystemCount > 3
| sort by SystemCount desc
content.title: Accounts that logged into more than 3 distinct Windows systems

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4624
| where LogonType in (3, 10)
| where isnotempty(TargetUserName) and TargetUserName !has '$'
| where isnotempty(IpAddress) and IpAddress != '-' and IpAddress != '127.0.0.1'
| summarize LogonCount = count(), Computers = make_set(Computer, 5) by TargetUserName, IpAddress
| where LogonCount > 5
| sort by LogonCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Network logons by account and source IP

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('deny', 'block', 'drop', 'DROP', 'Deny', 'Block')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP) and isnotempty(DestinationIP)
| where SourceIP startswith '10.' or SourceIP startswith '192.168.' or SourceIP startswith '172.'
| where DestinationIP startswith '10.' or DestinationIP startswith '192.168.' or DestinationIP startswith '172.'
| summarize DenyCount = count() by SourceIP, DestinationIP, DestinationPort
| where DenyCount > 10
| sort by DenyCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Internal-to-internal firewall denies — segmentation violations

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('deny', 'block', 'drop', 'DROP', 'Deny', 'Block')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP)
| where SourceIP startswith '10.' or SourceIP startswith '192.168.' or SourceIP startswith '172.'
| summarize ScanCount = dcount(DestinationPort) by SourceIP
| where ScanCount > 10
| sort by ScanCount desc
| take 15
content.title: Internal IPs scanning many ports — port scanner detection

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4688
| where NewProcessName has_any ('net.exe', 'net1.exe', 'nltest.exe', 'whoami.exe', 'ipconfig.exe', 'nbtstat.exe', 'arp.exe', 'route.exe', 'netstat.exe', 'systeminfo.exe', 'tasklist.exe', 'quser.exe', 'ping.exe', 'tracert.exe', 'nslookup.exe')
| summarize ExecCount = count() by SubjectUserName, NewProcessName, Computer
| where ExecCount > 3
| sort by ExecCount desc
| take 30
content.title: Recon commands executed on Windows servers

content.query:
Syslog
| where ProcessName in ('id', 'whoami', 'ifconfig', 'ip', 'netstat', 'ps', 'who', 'w', 'last', 'uname', 'hostname', 'arp', 'route', 'nmap', 'masscan')
| summarize Count = count() by HostName, ProcessName
| where Count > 3
| sort by Count desc
| take 20
content.title: Recon process execution on Unix servers
